positions.summary: S&P 500 index ETF tracking the broad U.S. equity market. Core long-term holding providing broad market exposure.
positions.catalyst: No specific catalyst — tracks overall market performance.
positions.why: Long-term core holding. Provides stable broad market exposure when no higher-conviction opportunity exists for uninvested capital.

positions.summary: Micron Technology is a leading manufacturer of DRAM and NAND memory chips, benefiting from AI-driven memory demand.
positions.catalyst: Earnings in approximately 9 trading days — memory demand trends and AI server build-out guidance will be key.
positions.why: Medium-term position built around the AI memory demand supercycle. Significant unrealized gain — pre-earnings exit rule applies.

positions.summary: Advanced Micro Devices competes directly with NVIDIA in data center GPUs, with a growing share of the AI training and inference market.
positions.catalyst: Q2 FY2026 earnings on August 4 — guided ~$11.2B revenue, up 46% YoY. Will show whether AI GPU share gains are materializing.
positions.why: Medium-term position built around a multi-quarter GPU share-gain thesis against NVDA. Reassess materially at August 4 earnings.

positions.summary: SpaceX, recently IPO'd, operates the dominant commercial launch business plus Starlink satellite internet with significant long-term optionality.
positions.catalyst: Index inclusion dates through late June and early July may drive forced buying from Russell 1000, MSCI, and Nasdaq-100 index funds.
positions.why: Long-term because the thesis is built around multi-year category leadership in launch and satellite infrastructure, not short-term post-IPO price action.

positions.summary: CoreWeave is a specialized AI cloud provider offering GPU compute infrastructure, primarily serving AI model training workloads.
positions.catalyst: Recently IPO'd — early commercial traction and hyperscaler contract announcements are the key near-term catalysts to watch.
positions.why: Medium-term position in the AI infrastructure buildout. Conviction depends on continued GPU demand from model training and inference.

positions.summary: NVIDIA is the dominant supplier of GPUs for AI training and inference, effectively the bellwether for global AI infrastructure capital spending.
positions.catalyst: Q2 FY2027 earnings on August 26 — guided ~$91B in revenue. The single most important data point for the entire AI infrastructure trade.
positions.why: Long-term core holding in the AI infrastructure buildout. Expected to be held for years absent a structural change to the thesis.

positions.summary: Humana is a managed care insurer focused on Medicare Advantage plans, sensitive to CMS reimbursement rates and utilization trends.
positions.catalyst: Q2 FY2026 earnings on July 29 — Medicare Advantage cost trends and full-year EPS guidance will determine whether the thesis holds.
positions.why: Short-term position entered specifically around the July 29 earnings catalyst with a pre-earnings exit rule in place.

positions.summary: Palantir provides AI-driven data analytics software to government and enterprise clients, with AIP as its fastest-growing product line.
positions.catalyst: Q2 FY2026 earnings on August 10 — guided $1.797-$1.801B revenue, ~71% full-year growth. Validates AIP commercial momentum.
positions.why: Medium-term position dependent on AIP adoption continuing to scale over several quarters. Valuation premium is a key risk to monitor.

positions.summary: Procure Space ETF provides exposure to companies involved in space-related industries including launch, satellites, and communications.
positions.catalyst: No specific near-term catalyst — tracks broad space industry performance.
positions.why: Long-term thematic holding in the space economy. Monitored separately from the active investment system.

positions.summary: Bitcoin held as a long-term store-of-value position. Monitored for macro liquidity conditions and regulatory developments.
positions.catalyst: No company-specific catalyst — monitored against macro liquidity and regulatory environment.
positions.why: Long-term structural allocation rather than a trade. Held through volatility, not actively traded around short-term price swings.

positions.summary: Zcash is a privacy-focused cryptocurrency using zero-knowledge cryptography to enable shielded transactions.
positions.catalyst: No specific near-term catalyst — monitored for broader crypto market conditions.
positions.why: Long-term thematic position in privacy-preserving blockchain infrastructure.

positions.summary: Ethereum is the leading smart contract platform. 99% staked generating ~$0.53/month in staking rewards.
positions.catalyst: No specific near-term catalyst — monitored for network upgrade developments and DeFi activity.
positions.why: Long-term core crypto holding. Staking rewards provide yield while holding for long-term appreciation.

positions.summary: XRP is used for cross-border payment settlement, with ongoing regulatory clarity improving its institutional adoption prospects.
positions.catalyst: SEC litigation resolution and institutional payment partnerships are the key long-term catalysts.
positions.why: Long-term position in digital payment infrastructure. Regulatory clarity is the primary thesis driver.
